query:
ALTER TABLE doctors 
ADD COLUMN procedures TEXT,
ADD COLUMN isVisiting BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

ALTER TABLE appointments
ADD COLUMN age INT,
ADD COLUMN procedure VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN additionalNotes TEXT,
ADD COLUMN staffNotes TEXT;
